news:news.news:title: The ongoing conflict in Iran and recent violence in Lebanon highlight escalating tensions in the region, while a tragic migrant incident off Greece raises humanitarian concerns.
news:news.news:keywords: Iran conflict analysis, Lebanon violence impact, migrant crisis in Greece, US protests against Trump, Epstein lawsuit settlement implications

news:news.news:title: US border businesses face challenges as Canadian tourists decline, while the stock market continues to struggle amid rising oil prices and geopolitical tensions.
news:news.news:keywords: US border business challenges, US stock market trends, minimum wage increases, impact of Iran war on economy, Ticketmaster fee changes

news:news.news:title: Suno's latest AI music model update emphasizes user customization, while Amazon's Big Spring Sale attracts shoppers with various deals.
news:news.news:keywords: AI music model updates, Amazon Spring Sale deals, Meta legal challenges, OpenAI video app discontinuation, foldable phone technology

news:news.news:title: Arizona and Illinois advance to the Final Four, while the USMNT faces a setback against Belgium in World Cup preparations.
news:news.news:keywords: NCAA Final Four updates, UFC fight results, USMNT World Cup preparation, Dominic Smith Braves walk-off, LeBron and Bronny James history

news:news.news:title: Recent scientific discoveries reveal significant health risks from sugar substitutes, advancements in carbon capture technology, and new insights into human evolution and animal behavior.
news:news.news:keywords: health risks of sugar substitutes, carbon capture technology advancements, human evolution discoveries, animal behavior studies, space weather research

news:news.news:title: Nepal's former Prime Minister was arrested following a deadly protest crackdown, while global tensions rise with Iran and North Korea's military ties.
news:news.news:keywords: Nepal protest crackdown, UN vote on slavery reparations, Iran military tensions, Cuba aid ships missing, euthanasia legal battles in Spain

news:news.news:title: US stock markets closed down for the fifth consecutive week amid rising oil prices and geopolitical tensions related to the Iran war.
news:news.news:keywords: US stock market trends, Trump's economic policies, minimum wage increase movements, impact of Iran war on US economy, rising costs of living in America

news:news.news:title: Sony has suspended sales of its memory cards due to shortages, while various tech products are on sale during the Big Spring Sale.
news:news.news:keywords: memory card shortages, Big Spring Sale discounts, new tech product launches, impact of data centers on environment, White House app features

news:news.news:title: Tiger Woods was arrested for DUI following a car crash, while college basketball teams advance in the NCAA tournament.
news:news.news:keywords: Tiger Woods DUI arrest, NCAA tournament updates, Connecticut Sun franchise sale

news:news.news:title: Recent scientific discoveries reveal new insights into human origins, bee nutrition, and the effects of Mars dust storms on water loss.
news:news.news:keywords: human evolution discoveries, bee nutrition breakthroughs, Mars water loss research, animal behavior studies, ocean species extinction

news:news.news:title: US Markets Slide for Fifth Week as Oil Prices Spike Amid Iran Conflict; Erythritol Raises Stroke Alarm
Tiger Woods Arrested for DUI After Car Crash, Adding to Sports Drama Amid NCAA Tournament Excitement
